lastUpdates.message: fix: persist geo coordinates for itinerary and library places
feat: move the day route map into the hero summary and add ferry endpoint exclusions
feat: add a day-by-day route preview map to the library sidebar
design: remove connector lines from the time cell and keep a simple vertical stack
design: center the duration button cell between start and end times
fix: restore release logging workflow and wire FCM delivery path
fix: refine address auto-fill icons (Sparkles/Wand2) and strengthen AI extraction instructions
feat: refactor Hero action buttons (icon-only), add Quick Add button, and AI Address extraction
fix: enhance Super Smart Fill address extraction with search fallback & state stability
feat: implement 'Super Smart Fill' for all info & refactor tag UI to '+' icon
fix: resolved critical rendering error (budgetSummary.remaining undefined)
feat: implement time lock (tower) logic & simplify smart fill UI
fix: enhance smart fill defense for link-only inputs & update FAQ guide
design: complete overhaul of time cell (tower) layout for better UX
feat: implement dedicated update logging system (update-log.json)
feat: refine place name extraction (strip category tags)
